statement: In every magma, Equation 1520 (`x = (y * y) * (x * (y * z))`) implies Equation 1244 (`x = x * (((y * x) * z) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0888
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y y) (op x (op y z)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op x (op (op (op y x) z) x))
